final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Instagram-style photo of trendy coffee and desserts in a Korean café aesthetic, shot as if with a smartphone.

Style/medium: smartphone photography, casual Instagram aesthetic, Korean café lifestyle shot, clean and bright with slight desaturation
Composition: overhead flat-lay angle, smartphone camera perspective, shallow depth of field with one main focus
Subject: iced latte in a glass cup with visible layers, small dessert plate with pastel-colored cake or pastry, ceramic saucer, minimal props
Scene/backdrop: light wooden café table, soft natural window light, blurred minimalist Korean café interior background, no people
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight from side window, bright and airy, cozy and inviting
Color palette: warm beige and cream base, soft pastel accents from dessert, muted greens from plant in background, cool coffee brown
Materials/textures: frosted glass condensation, smooth ceramic glaze, soft cake sponge texture, visible wood grain
Constraints: photo must include hand-drawn annotation overlay in white sketch lines with Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji); rough uneven stroke style; contour lines tracing object outlines; arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance; short diary-like comments about taste, texture, mood; decorative elements like steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons used sparingly with intentional white space; Instagram story / rough magazine notes aesthetic; stylish yet relaxed vibe
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic, photorealistic skin or people
